## Summary
- Describe the user-facing change.
- Note any technical or architectural tradeoffs.

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] I considered keyboard-only navigation and focus order.
- [ ] I verified interactive controls have accessible names.
- [ ] I verified labels, errors, and helper text are associated with form fields.
- [ ] I verified dialogs/menus/popovers use semantic roles and escape handling.
- [ ] I reviewed color contrast for newly introduced text/UI states.
- [ ] I updated/add tests for accessibility behavior where relevant.
- [ ] I reviewed `ACCESSIBILITY.md` and confirmed this PR meets the Definition of Done.

## Screenshots / Recording
- Add before/after images or short video for UI changes.

## Risks
- Call out anything that could regress behavior, accessibility, performance, or security.
